# processed_data/eda_insights — Context

## Purpose
Static **Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)** visualisation images generated during data cleaning. These are for documentation, reporting, and stakeholder review — not consumed at runtime.

## Generated By
`src/data_preprocessing/clean_data.py` → functions `visualize_data_patterns()` and `visualize_intersection_approaches()`

## Contents

### Traffic Pattern Plots
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `hourly_traffic_pattern.png` | Mean ± std traffic volume by hour of day (aggregated across all locations) |
| `daily_traffic_pattern.png` | Mean traffic by day of week (Mon–Sun) |
| `weekend_vs_weekday_pattern.png` | Weekday vs weekend average comparison |
| `missing_days_distribution.png` | Histogram of missing-day counts per location |

### Per-Location Heatmaps
Each `heatmap_<LOCATION>.png` shows a 2D heatmap of traffic volume by hour (x-axis) and day-of-week (y-axis) for a specific approach:
- `heatmap_BARKERS_RD_E_of_DENMARK_ST.png`
- `heatmap_BURWOOD_HWY_E_of_WARRIGAL_RD.png`
- `heatmap_CANTERBURY_RD_W_of_BALWYN_RD.png`
- `heatmap_DENMARK_ST_N_of_BARKERS_RD.png`
- `heatmap_HIGH_STREET_RD_W_of_WARRIGAL_RD.png`
- `heatmap_POWER_ST_S_of_BURWOOD_RD.png`
- `heatmap_PRINCESS_ST_S_of_CHANDLER_HWY.png`
- `heatmap_WARRIGAL_RD_N_of_TOORAK_RD.png`
- `heatmap_WARRIGAL_RD_S_OF_RIVERSDALE_RD.png`

### Intersection Approach Plots
Each `intersection_<SCATS_ID>_approaches.png` overlays hourly averages for all approach directions at the same intersection:
- `intersection_970_approaches.png`
- `intersection_2000_approaches.png`
- `intersection_2200_approaches.png`
- `intersection_2820_approaches.png`
- `intersection_2827_approaches.png`
- `locations_per_scats_histogram.png` — Distribution of how many approach-locations each SCATS site has

## Key Insights Captured
- Morning peak: ~7–9 AM; evening peak: ~5–6 PM
- Weekend volumes ~40–60% lower than weekday peaks
- Some sites show heavy directional asymmetry (inbound vs outbound)
- Missing data is clustered: a few locations have 5–10+ missing days within October 2006
